strengths: Demonstrated leadership in scaling distributed systems and event-driven architectures (e.g., GISCollective platform)
Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP, agentic workflows at re:cinq)
Strong background in high-performance, low-latency systems (e.g., real-time metadata handling at Dunnhumby)
concerns: Limited explicit fintech or credit-risk experience in resume or roles
No clear evidence of operating multi-agent AI systems in regulated environments
Scant mention of hybrid engineering models with external delivery partners
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong technical leadership in scalable, event-driven systems and emerging AI-agent tooling, with a track record of building production-grade platforms. However, his resume lacks direct fintech exposure (e.g., credit risk, embedded finance) and regulated-environment operations—critical for the CTO role in fintech infrastructure. His hybrid engineering experience (e.g., outsourced teams, CI/CD) is promising but not explicitly detailed for governance frameworks.
